steps.description: Data pre-processing included a summarization and quantile normalization step to generate probe set level signal intensities for each microarray experiment and was performed as previously published by Liu WM et al.
PQN and DQN: algorithms for expression microarrays.

raw_text: Data pre-processing included a summarization and quantile normalization step to generate probe set level signal intensities for each microarray experiment and was performed as previously published by Liu WM et al. PQN and DQN: algorithms for expression microarrays. J.Theor.Biol. 2006;243:273-278.
